verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That no one should be uplifted in his labour.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In Solomon, in Ecclesiasticus: “Extol not thyself in doing thy work.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the Gospel according to Luke: “Which of you, having a servant ploughing, or a shepherd, says to him when he cometh from the field, Pass forward and recline?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: But he says to him, Make ready somewhat that I may sup, and gird thyself, and minister to me, until I eat and drink; and afterwards thou shalt eat and drink?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Does he thank that servant because he has done what was commanded him?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: So also ye, when ye shall have done that which is commanded you, say, We are unprofitable servants; we have done what we had to do.”
